PostgreSQL answers:
'What is the current state
of this entity?'
'What changed and when?'

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Neo4j answers:
'What breaks if this
goes down?'
'What depends on what?'

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Prometheus answers:
'How is this performing
right now?'
'What was the p95 latency
over the last hour?'

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PostgreSQL
─────────────────
System of Record
Digital Products
Portfolios & Taxonomy
Inventory Entities
AI Providers & Agents
Change Requests
Credentials & Governance
Health Snapshots

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Neo4j Graph
─────────────────
Topology & Impact
DigitalProduct nodes
InfraCI nodes
EaElement nodes
DEPENDS_ON edges
MONITORS edges
BELONGS_TO edges
CHILD_OF edges

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Prometheus
─────────────────
Time-Series Metrics
Container CPU/Memory
Host Resources
Inference Latency
Token Consumption
Error Rates
Credential Expiry
Rate Limit Utilization

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
System Health Dashboard
Gauges · Charts · Alerts

Custom dashboards

Prometheus only
No graph · No business context
